name: Arizer Stainless Steel Stir tool
summary: Designed for use with Arizer Vaporisers.
description: Designed for use with Arizer Vaporisers. The Arizer Stainless Steel Stir tool is compatible with various Arizer Vaporisers: XQ2, Extreme Q, V-Tower, Solo 3, Solo 2 Max, Air Max, Solo 2 and practically any other vaporiser. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
